articles.title: Trump’s Ultra Bullish Crypto Moves To Drive $90 Billion Race For XRP, Solana ETF Approval
articles.description: A Bloomberg analyst has revealed the latest odds for spot altcoins ETF approval in the United States amid growing speculations.

articles.title: Ethereum 2.0 or Ethereum Lite? Buterin Calls for Stripped-Down Redesign
articles.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin proposes simplifying the network’s base protocol, aiming to improve efficiency, security, and long-term sustainability with a Bitcoin-inspired design.

The post Ethereum 2. 0 or Ethereum Lite? Buterin Calls for Stripped-Down Redesign first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: Apple Permits Crypto App Payments via External Sites After Court Order
articles.description: Apple changes App Store policy, allowing crypto payments via external sites. Major shift impacts Bitcoin, Ethereum, and NFT apps globally.
